name: GBrain
description: Personal knowledge brain for OpenClaw — semantic search, entity resolution, relationship graph, and enrichment for markdown repos

brainPath.description: Path to the markdown knowledge repository

openaiApiKey.description: OpenAI API key for embeddings (falls back to OPENAI_API_KEY env)

autoSync.description: Watch brainPath for git changes and auto-reindex

syncIntervalSeconds.description: Poll interval for git HEAD changes
